transactions.desc: The Angels outrighted Manoah to Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Angels optioned Johnson to Double-A Rocket City following Tuesday's 14-6 loss to the Athletics.
The Angels recalled Saucedo from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Rockies designated Crim for assignment Wednesday.
The Rockies selected Thompson's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Wednesday.
The Mets selected Thornton's contract from Triple-A Syracuse ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday in Washington.
The Mets optioned Duarte to Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Azocar for assignment Wednesday.
The Marlins optioned Garrett to Triple-A Jacksonville on Wednesday.
Atlanta activated White from the 7-day concussion injured list Wednesday.
The Rangers activated Curvelo (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday and optioned him to Triple-A Round Rock.
The Mariners optioned Ortiz to Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Mariners reinstated Brash (lat) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
Pittsburgh optioned Mattson to Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Dotel from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
Miami recalled Gibson from Triple-A Jacksonville on Wednesday.
Tampa Bay selected Dunn to the major-league roster Wednesday, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.
The Rays optioned Solesky to Triple-A Durham on Wednesday, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.
Tampa Bay reinstated Matz (elbow) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday against the Orioles, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.
The Tampa Bay Rays traded LHP Joe Rock to the Chicago White Sox.
The Chicago White Sox traded INF Oliver Dunn to the Tampa Bay Rays.
The Dodgers optioned Mills to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Tuesday.
The Astros reinstated Pearson (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Astros optioned Whitcomb to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday.
The Rockies optioned Thompson to Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
Meyers (oblique) was reinstated from the 10-day injured list and is starting in center field and batting seventh Tuesday against the Twins, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Rockies reinstated Freeman from the paternity list Tuesday.
Raley is not in the lineup Tuesday versus the White Sox.
The Diamondbacks selected Garcia's contract from Triple-A Reno on Tuesday.
The Blue Jays recalled Lee from Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
